title: P
description: P ( Potentiometer) is a passive utility module for attenuating low frequency signals within your patch. The module allows you to attenuate in either direction, or crossfade between two signals, using a simple slide pot. P is offered as a Fully Assembled module, Partial DIY Kit (PCB & Panel Only) or a Full DIY Kit (all components included.) Learn more about P on our documentation website!
